title: Salmon Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry recipe with salmon, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they are translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bell peppers and cook until they are tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the salmon fillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tangy stir-fry sauce and creamy soy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the salmon and vegetables, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
